NOPD use of force network, nodes sized by eigenvector centrality, colored by gephi-powered modularity, signing off for now, but cool to see some results so quickly! https://t.co/jqxvOQlolI
Now we are streaming our use of force officer network from Neo4J into Gephi and have a basic network to visualize... if I can stop crashing Gephi https://t.co/bpzICNbS3N

I was struggling a bit to find a way to tie officers together- but then I found it- there can be multiple officers in a single use-of-force incident. This isn't as strong a signal as complaint co-occurances, imo, but now we have a use of force officer network! https://t.co/AUbSe9fqVG

Had a good first push, got our data combined and into Datasette- I think that I am going to look at officer co-occurances in use of force data and try to build a network from that... taking a break for a second and then doing another 30 minute sprint! https://t.co/FctkSyaqmJ
Going live in 5ish, gonna lay out a gameplan and start grabbing our data before slicing and dicing 🔪
